official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound move_entity_pos packet fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official move_entity_pos body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns move_entity_pos to packet id 0x35.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the move_entity_pos id to ClientboundMoveEntityPacket.Pos.
The official move_entity_pos body is entity id VarInt, three signed short deltas, and one boolean onGround.
The fixture uses primitive fields and does not require initialized Entity, Level, or game state.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer entity existence, movement interpolation semantics, initialized Level state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
